summary: Applied ADR 0304 from the latest origin/main baseline by replaying OpenBao and Windmill on top of repo version 0.177.134, restoring the governed Windmill gate-status waiver summary contract, verifying the seeded atlas_drift_check job end to end, and then integrating the exact-main release surfaces for repo version 0.177.135 and platform version 0.130.85.

verification.observed: make converge-openbao env=production succeeded from the rebased ADR 0304 worktree with final recap docker-runtime-lv3 : ok=379 changed=8 failed=0 and postgres-lv3 : ok=73 changed=1 failed=0.

verification.check: Exact-main Windmill replay after wrapper contract fix
verification.observed: The first exact-main Windmill replay exposed the missing gate_status.waiver_summary contract on the seeded validation-gate wrapper; after updating config/windmill/scripts/gate-status.py to rebuild the governed waiver summary, make converge-windmill env=production passed with final recap docker-runtime-lv3 : ok=353 changed=46 failed=0, postgres-lv3 : ok=91 changed=2 failed=0, proxmox_florin : ok=41 changed=4 failed=0.
scripts/windmill_run_wait_result.py against f/lv3/atlas_drift_check returned status ok with report.status clean, drift_count 0, and no published notifications.

make atlas-validate, make atlas-lint, make atlas-refresh-snapshots, make atlas-validate, and make atlas-drift-check all completed successfully from the final worktree with clean drift output across the 20 cataloged PostgreSQL databases.

verification.check: Focused repository validation and generated-truth refresh
verification.observed: The focused Windmill suite passed with 72 tests, the broader targeted slice passed with 167 tests after updating two stale OpenBao helper assertions, python3 -m py_compile succeeded for the seeded Atlas and gate-status wrappers, and the release refresh surfaced then cleared a missing api-publication classification for platform-db-subjects.

notes: This is the exact-main receipt that justifies the platform version bump from 0.130.84 to 0.130.85 after the merged ADR 0304 workstream was replayed from the latest origin/main baseline.

The latest-main closeout uncovered a real wrapper contract gap rather than a platform runtime regression: scripts/gate_status.py emitted a raw payload without waiver_summary, so the seeded Windmill wrapper now rebuilds that governed field without changing the CLI-facing gate_status output.

The protected release surfaces were updated only after the live replay succeeded, and the release refresh also fixed the missing config/api-publication.json classification for the new platform.db.* event surface.
